creator: include@npf.pt.freebsd.org
text:
Sorry once again, but as time goes the typo team is always patching this 
tool. :)

diff -ruN typo.orig/Makefile typo/Makefile
--- typo.orig/Makefile	Fri Aug 18 11:47:39 2006
+++ typo/Makefile	Fri Aug 18 11:48:02 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	typo
-PORTVERSION=	2.6.0
+PORTVERSION=	4.0.3
  CATEGORIES=	www
  MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
diff -ruN typo.orig/distinfo typo/distinfo
--- typo.orig/distinfo	Fri Aug 18 11:47:39 2006
+++ typo/distinfo	Fri Aug 18 11:48:11 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (typo-2.6.0.tgz) = 0f4168c7a4c70c968a52bdbc6fba581a
-SHA256 (typo-2.6.0.tgz) = 
550529df66627ccad2981e657d8e2983f24de4db2acb5d5e6aab40f5391bdf1e
-SIZE (typo-2.6.0.tgz) = 323736
+MD5 (typo-4.0.3.tgz) = 2560c8a249920ee8027c2f86625d4072
+SHA256 (typo-4.0.3.tgz) = 
fd7a6c050e5c94bd008fb73fc180764d5634665f3c85b6561c3424cf6eee02bd
+SIZE (typo-4.0.3.tgz) = 685364

Thanks in advance
Francisco

--
Nucleo Portugues de FreeBSD - Core Member
http://npf.pt.freebsd.org
http://npf.pt.freebsd.org/~include/

On Fri, 11 Aug 2006, Francisco Cabrita <include> wrote:

>
> Hello, Typo developpers have released another update.
> 4.0.1 to 4.0.2
>
> diff -ruN typo.orig/Makefile typo/Makefile
> --- typo.orig/Makefile  Thu Aug 10 18:49:37 2006

> @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@

> -SHA256 (typo-2.6.0.tgz) =
